summary: San Bernardino City Unified School District (SBCUSD), the ninth-largest public school district in California serving approximately 44,000 students across 74 schools, is seeking a fully hosted integrated data warehouse and business intelligence (BI)/analytics platform to replace its current PowerSchool Analytics and Insights system. The solution must integrate data from over 20 student data sources—including Aeries SIS, CAASPP, ELPAC, NWEA MAP, College Board Suite, National Student Clearinghouse, Renaissance STAR, SEIS, and Google Suite—with nightly roster refreshes, real-time demographic updates, and import of 5 years of historical data, while supporting data lake capabilities for structured and semi-structured data ingestion. Key technical requirements include multi-level role-based security, Active Directory authentication, catastrophic event recovery within one week, natural language querying, GIS mapping, predictive analytics, language translation of dashboards, and compatibility with Windows, Mac, mobile platforms, and HP server hardware. The contract is structured as an initial one-year term with four successive one-year extension options at the District's sole discretion, for a maximum cumulative period of five years, with pricing held firm except for District-approved inflationary adjustments. Proposals are evaluated on a 100-point scale weighted heavily toward cost of services (40%), scope of work responses (25%), firm expertise with similarly sized school districts (15%), and training/support (10%). This procurement supports SBCUSD's strategic initiatives including program evaluation, early warning systems, MTSS/RTI, college and career readiness monitoring, District KPI tracking, and intervention effectiveness dashboards to drive data-informed decision-making at all organizational levels. The vendor must comply with FERPA, California Education Code AB 1584, and all applicable federal, state, and local regulations, and must provide comprehensive training, technical support, and an implementation plan with milestones.
periodOfPerformance: 1 year initial term + 4 one-year extension options (up to 5 years total)
agency: San Bernardino City Unified School District
title: Data Management and Business Intelligence Platform Solution
